build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=2

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=2

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length|--disable-adaptive-sampling'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --disable-adaptive-sampling --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

probes.name: fanout_scene_monkey.xml_64_2
probes.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y openimageio-tools time >/dev/null 2>&1; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_full.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_merged.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub0.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub1.exr; rm -f /tmp/cx_fanout_time_*.txt; /usr/bin/time -f 'CX_FULL_TIME_S=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_full.txt /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --device CUDA --disable-adaptive-sampling --samples 64 --output /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_full.exr examples/scene_monkey.xml >/tmp/cx_fanout_full.log 2>&1; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_full.txt; /usr/bin/time -f 'CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_0=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub0.txt /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --device CUDA --disable-adaptive-sampling --samples 64 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 32 --output /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub0.exr examples/scene_monkey.xml >/tmp/cx_fanout_sub0.log 2>&1; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub0.txt; /usr/bin/time -f 'CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_1=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub1.txt /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --device CUDA --disable-adaptive-sampling --samples 64 --sample-subset-offset 32 --sample-subset-length 32 --output /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub1.exr examples/scene_monkey.xml >/tmp/cx_fanout_sub1.log 2>&1; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub1.txt; /usr/bin/time -f 'CX_MERGE_TIME_S=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge.txt oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub0.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub1.exr --add --mulc 0.500000000000 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_merged.exr; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge.txt; set +e; DIFF=$(oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_full.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_merged.exr --diff 2>&1); DIFF_RC=$?; set -e; echo "$DIFF"; echo CX_FANOUT_DIFF_RC=$DIFF_RC; ls -lh /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_full.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_merged.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub0.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_monkey_64_2_CUDA_sub1.exr; echo CX_FANOUT_PROBE_OK scene=scene_monkey.xml samples=64 fanout=2 subset_len=32 device=CUDA

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length|--disable-adaptive-sampling'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --disable-adaptive-sampling --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

probes.name: fanout_scene_monkey.xml_4096_2

echo CX_FANOUT_PROBE_OK scene=scene_monkey.xml samples=4096 fanout=2 subset_len=2048 device=CUDA

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length|--disable-adaptive-sampling'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --disable-adaptive-sampling --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length|--disable-adaptive-sampling'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --disable-adaptive-sampling --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

import shutil

def read_time(path, key):
    with open(path) as f:
        for line in f:
            if line.startswith(key + "="):
                return float(line.split("=", 1)[1])
    raise SystemExit(f"missing {key} in {path}")

linear = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt", "CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S")
tree = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_tree.txt", "CX_MERGE_TREE_TIME_S")
if tree < linear:
    selected = "tree"
    value = tree
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged_tree.exr'
else:
    selected = "linear"
    value = linear
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged_linear.exr'
shutil.copyfile(src, '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged.exr')
print(f"CX_MERGE_SELECTED={selected}")
print(f"CX_MERGE_TIME_S={value:.6f}")
PY

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")
PY

import shutil

def read_time(path, key):
    with open(path) as f:
        for line in f:
            if line.startswith(key + "="):
                return float(line.split("=", 1)[1])
    raise SystemExit(f"missing {key} in {path}")

linear = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt", "CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S")
tree = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_tree.txt", "CX_MERGE_TREE_TIME_S")
if tree < linear:
    selected = "tree"
    value = tree
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged_tree.exr'
else:
    selected = "linear"
    value = linear
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged_linear.exr'
shutil.copyfile(src, '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged.exr')
print(f"CX_MERGE_SELECTED={selected}")
print(f"CX_MERGE_TIME_S={value:.6f}")

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")
PY

import shutil

def read_time(path, key):
    with open(path) as f:
        for line in f:
            if line.startswith(key + "="):
                return float(line.split("=", 1)[1])
    raise SystemExit(f"missing {key} in {path}")

linear = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt", "CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S")
tree = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_tree.txt", "CX_MERGE_TREE_TIME_S")
if tree < linear:
    selected = "tree"
    value = tree
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged_tree.exr'
else:
    selected = "linear"
    value = linear
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged_linear.exr'
shutil.copyfile(src, '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged.exr')
print(f"CX_MERGE_SELECTED={selected}")
print(f"CX_MERGE_TIME_S={value:.6f}")
PY

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_8w_32c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")
PY

import shutil

def read_time(path, key):
    with open(path) as f:
        for line in f:
            if line.startswith(key + "="):
                return float(line.split("=", 1)[1])
    raise SystemExit(f"missing {key} in {path}")

linear = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt", "CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S")
tree = read_time("/tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_tree.txt", "CX_MERGE_TREE_TIME_S")
if tree < linear:
    selected = "tree"
    value = tree
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged_tree.exr'
else:
    selected = "linear"
    value = linear
    src = '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged_linear.exr'
shutil.copyfile(src, '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged.exr')
print(f"CX_MERGE_SELECTED={selected}")
print(f"CX_MERGE_TIME_S={value:.6f}")
PY

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_4096_16w_64c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")
PY

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /opt; if [ ! -d /opt/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /opt/cx-cycles; fi; cd /opt/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_90' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /opt/cx-cycles; test -x /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length|--disable-adaptive-sampling'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --disable-adaptive-sampling --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

import os
import subprocess
import sys
import time

bin_path = '/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles'
scene_path = 'examples/scene_world_volume.xml'
device = 'CUDA'
disable_adaptive = True
samples = 1024
subset_len = 128
fanout = 4
outputs = ['/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub0.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub1.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub2.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub3.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub4.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub5.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub6.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_sub7.exr']

pending = list(range(len(outputs)))
running = {}
failures = []
phase_start = time.time()

def command(index):
    args = [bin_path]
    if device:
        args.extend(["--device", device])
    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, started, log_file, log_path)

while pending or running:
    while pending and len(running) < fanout:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={elapsed:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(line + "\n")
        if rc != 0:
            failures.append((index, rc, log_path))
    if pending or running:
        time.sleep(0.05)

phase_wall = time.time() - phase_start
print(f"CX_SUBSET_PHASE_WALL_S={phase_wall:.6f}", flush=True)
if failures:
    for index, rc, log_path in failures:
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_FAILURE index={index} rc={rc} log={log_path}", flush=True)
        try:
            with open(log_path, "rb") as f:
                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass
    sys.exit(1)
PY

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_4w_8c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /opt; if [ ! -d /opt/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /opt/cx-cycles; fi; cd /opt/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

rm -f /tmp/cx_fanout_time_*.txt; echo CX_WORKER_COUNT=8; echo CX_CHUNK_COUNT=16; echo CX_CHUNK_SAMPLE_LENGTH=64; echo CX_SUBSET_EXECUTION_MODE=parallel; /usr/bin/time -f 'CX_FULL_TIME_S=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_full.txt /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --device CUDA --disable-adaptive-sampling --samples 1024 --output /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_full.exr examples/scene_world_volume.xml >/tmp/cx_fanout_full.log 2>&1; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_full.txt; python3 - <<'PY'

import os
import subprocess
import sys
import time

bin_path = '/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles'
scene_path = 'examples/scene_world_volume.xml'
device = 'CUDA'
disable_adaptive = True
samples = 1024
subset_len = 64
fanout = 8
outputs = ['/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub0.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub1.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub2.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub3.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub4.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub5.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub6.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub7.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub8.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub9.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub10.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub11.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub12.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub13.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub14.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub15.exr']

pending = list(range(len(outputs)))
running = {}
failures = []
phase_start = time.time()

def command(index):
    args = [bin_path]
    if device:
        args.extend(["--device", device])
    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, started, log_file, log_path)

while pending or running:
    while pending and len(running) < fanout:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={elapsed:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(line + "\n")
        if rc != 0:
            failures.append((index, rc, log_path))
    if pending or running:
        time.sleep(0.05)

phase_wall = time.time() - phase_start
print(f"CX_SUBSET_PHASE_WALL_S={phase_wall:.6f}", flush=True)
if failures:
    for index, rc, log_path in failures:
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_FAILURE index={index} rc={rc} log={log_path}", flush=True)
        try:
            with open(log_path, "rb") as f:
                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass
    sys.exit(1)
PY
/usr/bin/time -f 'CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub0.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub1.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub2.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub3.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub4.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub5.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub6.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub7.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub8.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub9.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub10.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub11.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub12.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub13.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub14.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub15.exr --add --mulc 0.062500000000 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_merged.exr; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt; awk -F= '/CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S/ {print "CX_MERGE_TIME_S=" $2}' /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt; echo CX_MERGE_SELECTED=linear; oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_full.exr -d uint8 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_full.png >/tmp/cx_fanout_png_full.log 2>&1; oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_merged.exr -d uint8 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_merged.png >/tmp/cx_fanout_png_merged.log 2>&1; python3 - <<'PY'

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())

    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, started, log_file, log_path)

    while pending and len(running) < fanout:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={elapsed:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:

        if rc != 0:

                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

import os
import subprocess
import sys
import time

bin_path = '/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles'
scene_path = 'examples/scene_cube_volume.xml'
device = 'CUDA'
disable_adaptive = True
samples = 1024
subset_len = 64
fanout = 8
outputs = ['/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub0.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub1.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub2.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub3.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub4.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub5.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub6.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub7.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub8.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub9.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub10.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub11.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub12.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub13.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub14.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_sub15.exr']

pending = list(range(len(outputs)))
running = {}
failures = []
phase_start = time.time()

def command(index):
    args = [bin_path]
    if device:
        args.extend(["--device", device])
    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, started, log_file, log_path)

while pending or running:
    while pending and len(running) < fanout:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={elapsed:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(line + "\n")
        if rc != 0:
            failures.append((index, rc, log_path))
    if pending or running:
        time.sleep(0.05)

phase_wall = time.time() - phase_start
print(f"CX_SUBSET_PHASE_WALL_S={phase_wall:.6f}", flush=True)
if failures:
    for index, rc, log_path in failures:
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_FAILURE index={index} rc={rc} log={log_path}", flush=True)
        try:
            with open(log_path, "rb") as f:
                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass
    sys.exit(1)

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_8w_16c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_32c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_32c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")
PY

import os
import subprocess
import sys
import time

bin_path = '/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles'
scene_path = 'examples/scene_world_volume.xml'
device = 'CUDA'
disable_adaptive = True
samples = 1024
subset_len = 128
fanout = 8
outputs = ['/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub0.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub1.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub2.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub3.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub4.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub5.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub6.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub7.exr']

pending = list(range(len(outputs)))
running = {}
failures = []
phase_start = time.time()

def command(index):
    args = [bin_path]
    if device:
        args.extend(["--device", device])
    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, started, log_file, log_path)

while pending or running:
    while pending and len(running) < fanout:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={elapsed:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(line + "\n")
        if rc != 0:
            failures.append((index, rc, log_path))
    if pending or running:
        time.sleep(0.05)

phase_wall = time.time() - phase_start
print(f"CX_SUBSET_PHASE_WALL_S={phase_wall:.6f}", flush=True)
if failures:
    for index, rc, log_path in failures:
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_FAILURE index={index} rc={rc} log={log_path}", flush=True)
        try:
            with open(log_path, "rb") as f:
                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass
    sys.exit(1)
PY
/usr/bin/time -f 'CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S=%e' -o /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub0.exr /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub1.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub2.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub3.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub4.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub5.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub6.exr --add /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub7.exr --add --mulc 0.125000000000 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_merged.exr; cat /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt; awk -F= '/CX_MERGE_LINEAR_TIME_S/ {print "CX_MERGE_TIME_S=" $2}' /tmp/cx_fanout_time_merge_linear.txt; echo CX_MERGE_SELECTED=linear; oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_full.exr -d uint8 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_full.png >/tmp/cx_fanout_png_full.log 2>&1; oiiotool /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_merged.exr -d uint8 -o /tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_merged.png >/tmp/cx_fanout_png_merged.log 2>&1; python3 - <<'PY'

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")

        "--output", outputs[index],

    ])

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_merged.png')

tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)

for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]

import os
import subprocess
import sys
import time

bin_path = '/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles'
scene_path = 'examples/scene_cube_volume.xml'
device = 'CUDA'
disable_adaptive = True
samples = 1024
subset_len = 64
fanout = 16
outputs = ['/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub0.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub1.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub2.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub3.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub4.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub5.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub6.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub7.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub8.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub9.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub10.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub11.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub12.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub13.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub14.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_sub15.exr']

pending = list(range(len(outputs)))
running = {}
failures = []
phase_start = time.time()

def command(index):
    args = [bin_path]
    if device:
        args.extend(["--device", device])
    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, started, log_file, log_path)

while pending or running:
    while pending and len(running) < fanout:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={elapsed:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(line + "\n")
        if rc != 0:
            failures.append((index, rc, log_path))
    if pending or running:
        time.sleep(0.05)

phase_wall = time.time() - phase_start
print(f"CX_SUBSET_PHASE_WALL_S={phase_wall:.6f}", flush=True)
if failures:
    for index, rc, log_path in failures:
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_FAILURE index={index} rc={rc} log={log_path}", flush=True)
        try:
            with open(log_path, "rb") as f:
                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass
    sys.exit(1)

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def load(path):
    arr = np.asarray(Image.open(path).convert("RGB"), dtype=np.float64) / 255.0
    return 0.2126 * arr[..., 0] + 0.7152 * arr[..., 1] + 0.0722 * arr[..., 2]

def ssim(a, b):
    c1 = 0.01 ** 2
    c2 = 0.03 ** 2
    mux = float(a.mean())
    muy = float(b.mean())
    vx = float(((a - mux) ** 2).mean())
    vy = float(((b - muy) ** 2).mean())
    cov = float(((a - mux) * (b - muy)).mean())
    denom = (mux * mux + muy * muy + c1) * (vx + vy + c2)
    if denom == 0:
        return 1.0 if np.array_equal(a, b) else 0.0
    return ((2 * mux * muy + c1) * (2 * cov + c2)) / denom

full = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_full.png')
merged = load('/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_cube_volume_1024_16w_16c_CUDA_merged.png')
h, w = full.shape
tile = max(16, min(h, w) // 8)
tiles = []
for y in range(0, h, tile):
    for x in range(0, w, tile):
        aa = full[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        bb = merged[y:min(y + tile, h), x:min(x + tile, w)]
        if aa.size:
            tiles.append(ssim(aa, bb))
delta = np.abs(full - merged)
print(f"CX_QUALITY_SSIM={ssim(full, merged):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_WORST_TILE_SSIM={min(tiles) if tiles else 1.0:.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_TILE_COUNT={len(tiles)}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAE={float(delta.mean()):.9f}")
print(f"CX_QUALITY_PNG_MAXE={float(delta.max()):.9f}")

build_stages.name: deps
build_stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

build_stages.name: clone
build_stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /opt; if [ ! -d /opt/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /opt/cx-cycles; fi; cd /opt/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

build_stages.name: sync_libs
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

build_stages.name: apply_patches
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_1.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0002-device-skip-oidn-cuda-probe-by-default.patch; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_2.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0003-standalone-disable-adaptive-sampling-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=3

build_stages.name: build
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; BUILD_CMAKE_ARGS='-DWITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_OPTIX=OFF -DWITH_CYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES=ON -DCYCLES_CUDA_BINARIES_ARCH=sm_89' PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

build_stages.name: binary_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /opt/cx-cycles; test -x /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length|--disable-adaptive-sampling'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --disable-adaptive-sampling --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

build_stages.name: render_smoke
build_stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /opt/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

skip_build_validation_stages.name: binary_smoke
skip_build_validation_stages.cmd: set -e; cd /opt/cx-cycles; test -x /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

skip_build_validation_stages.name: patch_cli_smoke

import os
import subprocess
import sys
import time

bin_path = '/opt/cx-cycles/install/cycles'
scene_path = 'examples/scene_world_volume.xml'
device = 'CUDA'
disable_adaptive = True
samples = 1024
subset_len = 128
fanout = 8
parallel_slots = 8
subset_retries = 1
outputs = ['/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub0.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub1.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub2.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub3.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub4.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub5.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub6.exr', '/tmp/cx_fanout_scene_world_volume_1024_8w_8c_CUDA_sub7.exr']

pending = list(range(len(outputs)))
running = {}
failures = []
attempts = {index: 0 for index in range(len(outputs))}
totals = {index: 0.0 for index in range(len(outputs))}
phase_start = time.time()

def command(index):
    args = [bin_path]
    if device:
        args.extend(["--device", device])
    if disable_adaptive:
        args.append("--disable-adaptive-sampling")
    args.extend([
        "--samples", str(samples),
        "--sample-subset-offset", str(index * subset_len),
        "--sample-subset-length", str(subset_len),
        "--output", outputs[index],
        scene_path,
    ])
    return args

def start_one(index):
    attempts[index] += 1
    attempt = attempts[index]
    try:
        if os.path.exists(outputs[index]):
            os.remove(outputs[index])
    except OSError:
        pass
    log_path = f"/tmp/cx_fanout_sub{index}_attempt{attempt}.log"
    log_file = open(log_path, "w")
    started = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        command(index),
        cwd='/opt/cx-cycles',
        stdout=log_file,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
    )
    running[proc] = (index, attempt, started, log_file, log_path)

while pending or running:
    while pending and len(running) < parallel_slots:
        start_one(pending.pop(0))
    for proc in list(running):
        rc = proc.poll()
        if rc is None:
            continue
        index, attempt, started, log_file, log_path = running.pop(proc)
        log_file.close()
        elapsed = time.time() - started
        totals[index] += elapsed
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_ATTEMPT_TIME_S_{index}_{attempt}={elapsed:.6f}", flush=True)
        reason = None
        if rc != 0:
            reason = rc
        elif not os.path.exists(outputs[index]) or os.path.getsize(outputs[index]) <= 0:
            reason = "missing-output"
        if reason is not None and attempt <= subset_retries:
            print(
                f"CX_SUBSET_RETRY index={index} attempt={attempt} reason={reason}",
                flush=True,
            )
            pending.append(index)
            continue
        line = f"CX_SUBSET_TIME_S_{index}={totals[index]:.6f}"
        print(line, flush=True)
        with open(f"/tmp/cx_fanout_time_sub{index}.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(line + "\n")
        if reason is not None:
            failures.append((index, reason, log_path))
    if pending or running:
        time.sleep(0.05)

phase_wall = time.time() - phase_start
print(f"CX_SUBSET_PHASE_WALL_S={phase_wall:.6f}", flush=True)
if failures:
    for index, rc, log_path in failures:
        print(f"CX_SUBSET_FAILURE index={index} rc={rc} log={log_path}", flush=True)
        try:
            with open(log_path, "rb") as f:
                tail = f.read()[-2000:].decode(errors="replace")
            print(tail, flush=True)
        except OSError:
            pass
    sys.exit(1)
